scripts.test:coverage: coverage run --source=back,sim -m pytest && coverage report && coverage html
scripts.lint: flake8 back sim && black --check back sim && mypy back sim
scripts.validate: npm run validate:init && npm run validate:licenses && npm run validate:branch
scripts.setup: pip install -e .[dev] && pre-commit install && cd front && npm install && cd ..
scripts.ci:test: npm run lint && npm run test:coverage
